hero.subtitle: Learn online with total flexibility and prove your knowledge in in-person exams. Our school has 2 years of experience training qualified professionals for the job market.

courses.title: Technical Courses That Transform Careers
courses.subtitle: 3 carefully designed courses to train qualified professionals. 100% online methodology with market-recognized certification.
courses.footerText: Want to know all the details of our courses?

items.title: Nursing Technician
items.description: Nursing care, anatomy and physiology, medication administration and technical procedures. Build your career in healthcare.

items.title: Administration Technician
items.description: Business management, human resources, finance and marketing. Get ready to lead teams and processes.

items.title: Accounting Technician
items.description: Tax bookkeeping, financial statements, accounting analysis and compliance. Become a numbers specialist.

features.title: Why choose our school?
features.subtitle: Discover the differentials that make our school the best choice for your professional technical training.

items.title: 2 Years of Experience
items.description: An established school with a proven track record of training qualified professionals.

items.title: 100% Online
items.description: Study whenever and wherever you want. Recorded and live classes, available 24/7 on our platform.

items.title: Recognized Certification
items.description: Certificates valid nationwide, recognized by the Ministry of Education and accepted by the market.

items.title: Personalized Support
items.description: Individual guidance from specialized tutors and technical support always available.

features.methodText: Our approach combines the flexibility of online learning with the credibility of in-person assessments. You study at your own pace and prove your knowledge consistently.

methodology.title: How our teaching method works
methodology.subtitle: An innovative methodology that combines the flexibility of online learning with the credibility of in-person assessments.

steps.title: Study Online
steps.subtitle: Total flexibility
steps.description: Access recorded and live classes anytime, anywhere. Our platform is available 24/7.

steps.title: Practice
steps.subtitle: Active learning
steps.description: Develop real projects and complete practical exercises that simulate job-market situations.

steps.title: Prove It
steps.subtitle: In-person assessment
steps.description: Take in-person exams at our campus to validate your learning and ensure the credibility of the certificate.

steps.title: Get Certified
steps.subtitle: Official recognition
steps.description: Receive your technical certificate recognized by the Ministry of Education and accepted nationwide.

methodology.ctaText: Join the 500+ professionals who have already transformed their careers with our technical courses.

testimonials.title: What our students say
testimonials.subtitle: Over 500 professionals have already transformed their careers. Discover some success stories.

items.name: Maria Silva Santos
items.testimony: The course exceeded my expectations! The online methodology with in-person exams gave me full confidence in the certificate. Today I work as a developer and increased my salary by 80%. The teachers are excellent and the support is incomparable.

items.name: João Pedro Costa
items.testimony: Total flexibility to study! As a father, I managed to balance work, studies and family. The material is very complete and the classes are dynamic. After graduating, I took over the administrative department where I work.

items.name: Ana Carolina Ferreira
items.testimony: The teaching quality is exceptional. I left the course prepared for the real job market. The practical cases made all the difference in my training. I recommend it to everyone seeking quality technical education and professional recognition.

items.name: Rafael Oliveira
items.testimony: I completely changed careers through the course. I moved from sales to IT and have no regrets. The tutors' guidance was key to my success. Today I work at a tech company with a solid career ahead.

items.name: Patrícia Mendes
items.testimony: A very well-structured course! The people management and strategic planning content transformed my business vision. I got a promotion before even finishing the course. The school truly prepares you for today's job market.

footer.companyDesc: Training qualified professionals for 2 years. 100% online technical courses with certification recognized by the Ministry of Education and in-person validation.
footer.newsletterText: Receive information about new courses, enrollment dates and tips for your professional career.
footer.accreditation: Tax ID: 12.345.678/0001-90 | Ministry of Education accreditation no. 12345
footer.disclaimer: This school follows all Ministry of Education guidelines for professional technical education. Issued certificates are valid nationwide and recognized by the job market.

demo.subtitle: Explore the platform through its three access profiles
demo.chooseProfile: Choose a profile below to enter the matching environment
demo.aboutData: Realistic data: the environments are populated with a sample dataset — students, teachers, courses and classes — that mirrors a real academic operation.
demo.aboutNav: Full navigation: explore the sidebar and walk through each profile's flows freely.
demo.aboutResponsive: Fully responsive: resize the window to see the interface adapt to desktop, tablet and mobile.
demo.aboutMetrics: Dynamic metrics: averages, attendance and indicators are computed in real time from the data.
demo.builtWith: Built with React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui

auth.quickHint: Instant access to the demo environment — no credentials required.
